title: ArtifactPointer
description: A journal-relative pointer (path + content digest) to a stage artifact. The only way stages exchange non-scalar data (ARCHITECTURE.md §5).

path.description: Journal-relative path to the artifact bytes. Must be contained: not absolute (no leading '/') and no '..' path component. This pattern matches the Go containment check (ArtifactPointer.Resolve / ResolveContainedPath), so a foreign-authored envelope that would escape the journal fails at validate time, not only at resolve time (#125). Uses an RE2-compatible pattern (no lookahead): each '/'-separated segment must contain a non-dot char, or be a lone '.', or be three-or-more dots — so a '..' segment can never appear.
